items.title: Cathie Wood Increases Bet On Nvidia And AMD Despite China Chip Hurdles, Ark Dumps Microsoft Stock Worth $9.7 Million
items.description: Ark Invest made major portfolio shifts on Tuesday April 22, 2025, boosting stakes in Nvidia, AMD, and Airbnb while trimming Microsoft and others to reposition amid U.S. chip export restrictions and shifting tech trends.

items.title: Cloud Infrastructure Growth Could Cool This Year Despite AI Excitement, Analyst Says
items.description: Amazon stock has been hit by fears about tariffs and e-commerce but analysts are warning about cloud risks as well.

items.title: CoreWeave Stock Gets a Wave of Buy Ratings. But No One Is Denying the Risk.
items.description: CoreWeave stock has been on a wild ride since its March IPO. Analysts are bullish from here but acknowledge plenty of risk in CoreWeave’s rapid growth.

items.title: Mizuho Is Bullish on Microsoft’s (MSFT) Cloud Businesses
items.description: Microsoft’s (MSFT) cloud-infrastructure unit, Azure, is well-positioned to deliver “impressive..growth” over the long term, Gregg Moskowitz, an analyst at Japanese bank Mizuho, wrote recently. Moskowitz has a $475 price target and an Outperform rating on MSFT.
